creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 162493
patch with update to 2.22

Hello,

attached a patch to update this port to its current version. I also stripped one file.

I've done a build test with poudriere for 9.3, 10.1 and 10.2 amd64. Everything was fine.

Also the QA:
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)

For Runtime Test i executed its testframework:
